tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Michael Jordan is widely regarded as the greatest basketball player of all time.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: He won six NBA championships with the Chicago Bulls and five MVP awards.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Jordan was a key member of the legendary 1992 USA Dream Team.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: LeBron James is one of the most complete basketball players in NBA history.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: He has won multiple NBA championships and MVP awards.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: LeBron is known for his longevity and all around skills.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Kobe Bryant was one of the greatest scorers in NBA history.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: He won five NBA championships with the Los Angeles Lakers.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Bryant scored 81 points in a single NBA game, the second highest in history.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Magic Johnson revolutionized the point guard position with his passing and leadership.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: He won five NBA championships with the Los Angeles Lakers.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Magic was also a member of the 1992 Dream Team.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Larry Bird was one of the greatest shooters and competitors in basketball history.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: He won three NBA championships with the Boston Celtics.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Bird was famous for his rivalry with Magic Johnson.
